verses.text: “Tu-in na thu ko in: Nang hong huh ding om ahi hiam? A siangthote kua pen' lam zuan ding na hi hiam
Mihaipa in a hehna sihlawh a, muhdahna in sihna piangsak hi
Mihaipa in limtakin zung kha ngei napi, ama inn thakhatin a kizunglot ka mu ngei hi
A tapate suahtaksak zawh ding hi nawnlo hi. Kulhkongpi gei-ah amaute kisugawp a, amaute a honkhia ding kuamah omlo hi
Midangte in a neihsate liahtumsak uh a, amah sangin a hatzawpa in a um a beel sunga a omte nangawn laksak a, a neih a lam duhgawhin a deihgawh hi
Leilak panin gimna hong piangtawm lo a, lei sung panin lungkhamna hong pokhiatawm lo hi
Mei-ek a to leen' mah bangin mihingte in amau' lungkhamna ding mah a piangsak uh hi
“Nang hi leng, ka Pasian' tungah ka thum ding a, ama tungah ka thu ka ap ding hi
Amah in na liante leh kuama phawk zawhloh thute sem a, genzawh lohin a lamdang na tampi a bawl hi
Amah in guah zusak a, lo khempeuh tui a buak hi
Amah in mi niamte sangkoih a, a dahte lungnuamsak hi
Amah in migilote' geelna suksiatsak ahih manin amaute in a ngimna uh tangtun' theilo uh hi
Amah in migilote amau' gitlohna mahah awksak a, ngian a zangte' geelna zong a lumletsak hi
Sunthapai-in khuamial sung kiden'na a, suntangpi mahin zan bangin mial a zawt uh hi
Ahi zongin amah in amau' kiang panin pa neilote honkhia a, mi thahatte kiang panin mi cimawhte a honkhia hi
Tua ahih manin mizawngte in lametna neikik uh a, thumanlo mite ahih leh kihencip hi
“Pasian in a taii mite mi nuamsa hizaw ahih manin, Vanglianpa' taiina thupi san' in
Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in a liamsak hangin a liamna tunsak ding a, ama satna liamma damsak ding hi
Lungkhamna gukvei dong na tuahna-ah amah in nang hong hon ding a, a sagihveina dingah siatna in nang hong su nawnlo ding hi
Kialpi sungin sihna ding pan nang hong honkhia ding a, galsungah namsau panin nang hong suaktasak ding hi
Gensiatna panin nang hong kihu ding a, siatna hong tun' ciangin na lau kei ding hi
Suksiat ding leh puksih dingte na nuihsan lel ding a, leitung gamsate na kihta kei ding hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh na lo sungah suang omlo ding a, gamlak gamsate in hong sulo ding hi
Na inn sungah lunghihmawhna ding omlo hi, ci-in na thei ding a, na inn kiim na et ciangin a kitasam bangmah omlo ding hi
Na suan na khakte tampi tak pha ding hi, ci-in na thei ding a, na sunga piangte leitung lopa zah pha ding hi, ci-in na thei ding hi
A hun ciangin ancilna phualah buhlom a tun' mah bangin a teek sihin han na zuan ding hi
Hih thute khempeuh ka kantel uh a, a thuman a na hi hi. Hih thute ka zaksa uh hi a, a manna na thei ding hi,” a ci hi.
